steps.assistant_content_head:
I'll create a personal portfolio website for Lena Reyes following all the specified requirements. I'll build a single HTML file with inline CSS and JavaScript, then verify it by rendering to PNG.

First, I'll create the HTML file with the required structure:

tool_calls.name: write_file
tool_calls.content_head:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Lena Reyes - UX Designer & Researcher</title>

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now render the portfolio.html file to a PNG using a headless browser to verify that it meets all the specified requirements. I'll use Playwright to render the page at 1920x1080 viewport.

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: python3 -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright().start(); b=p.chromium.launch(); pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1920,'height':1080}); pg.goto('file://' + __import__('o

steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now examine the rendered PNG to verify that the portfolio website meets all the specified requirements.

I can see that the hero section is displaying correctly with the gradient background from #1a1a4e to #6b21a8, and the text "Lena Reyes" and "UX Designer & Researcher" is centered in white. The "View Work" button is also visible.

However, I notice that the header navigation is not displaying the logo "LR" as specified - it's showing "Work", "About", "Contact" text instead. Also, the project tiles
